name: Imported from cv.md
text:
# SHREY BISHNOI
+1 (623) 498-7996 | shreybishnoi.dev@gmail.com | [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/shreybishnoi) | [GitHub](https://github.com/shreybishnoi)

## SUMMARY
Software Engineer and MS Computer Science student at Arizona State University with 2+ years of experience building and maintaining production backend and full-stack systems. Strong foundation in object-oriented design, data structures, RESTful APIs, and relational databases, with a focus on performance, reliability, and clean system design. Comfortable owning features end-to-end within modern SDLC and Agile environments.

## EDUCATION
**Arizona State University (GPA: 4.11/4.0)** | **Aug 2025 – May 2027**
*Master of Science, Computer Science* | Tempe, AZ, USA

**Maharaja Agrasen Institute of Technology (GPA: 3.7/4.0)** | **Aug 2019 – Jul 2023**
*Bachelor of Science, Computer Science and Engineering* | New Delhi, India

## SKILLS
*   **Languages:** Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, C++, Java, SQL
*   **Backend & APIs:** RESTful services, OOP design, data modeling, ETL pipelines, performance optimization
*   **Frontend:** React, Vue.js-style frameworks, HTML, CSS
*   **Databases & Systems:** PostgreSQL, MySQL, Kafka, RocksDB, Neo4j
*   **Tools & Platforms:** Git, Docker, Kubernetes (Minikube), AWS (EC2, RDS), Linux, CI/CD
*   **Practices:** Agile SDLC, code reviews, testing, documentation, analytical problem-solving

## EXPERIENCE
**Software Engineer | ZS Associates** | **Sep 2023 – Jun 2025**
*   Owned and maintained 5+ production backend services using Python, Node.js, and PostgreSQL, supporting analytics workflows for 3+ product and data teams and enabling reliable data delivery at scale.
*   Optimized data-intensive REST APIs by tuning SQL queries, adding indexes, and refactoring service logic, reducing report latency by 40% and improving overall system responsiveness.
*   Automated ETL pipelines in Python and SQL and built 3+ internal React dashboards for monitoring system health, data freshness, and KPIs, cutting manual analyst effort by 40% and improving operational visibility.

**Software Engineer Intern | Dreadnought School** | **Jun 2022 – Aug 2022**
*   Implemented backend features using strong OOP principles and data structures within a client-server architecture, contributing to 10+ feature modules with clean, maintainable service design.
*   Designed and consumed HTTP/REST APIs, gaining hands-on experience with request lifecycles, validation, and error handling while working with PostgreSQL/MySQL across multiple relational schemas.
*   Developed responsive UI components using modern JavaScript frameworks (Vue.js-style patterns) and collaborated using Git in a 5+ member team, gaining exposure to CI/CD pipelines, cloud deployments, and Agile workflows.

**Full-Stack Developer Intern | Andwemet Pvt Ltd** | **Jun 2021 – Oct 2021**
*   Built a customer-facing onboarding system using the MERN stack, designing and implementing frontend user flows while developing backend APIs to handle user data, validation, and onboarding logic for 100+ active users.
*   Improved onboarding efficiency through iterative UI refinements and backend performance improvements, reducing onboarding time by 35% and increasing feature adoption by 50% based on user interaction patterns.

**Teaching Assistant | Coding Ninjas** | **Jun 2022 – Sep 2022**
*   Spearheaded mentorship program for 100+ students in C++ data structures and algorithms, offering guidance on core concepts and reducing student debugging time by 15% through personalized code reviews.
*   Reviewed 200+ code submissions, identified logical errors and edge cases, and explained trade-offs and optimizations clearly, helping students improve correctness, performance, and coding discipline.

PROJECTS
Real-Time Graph Analytics System — Kafka, RocksDB, Neo4j, Docker, Kubernetes
•Designed a distributed analytics system ingesting high-throughput event streams via Kafka, enabling scalable, fault-tolerant
real-time data processing across multiple containerized services.
•Managed application state using RocksDB and executed graph algorithms with Neo4j, deploying services using Docker and
Kubernetes to achieve 2×throughput under concurrent workloads.
Gym Occupancy T racker — Next.js, Supabase, PostgreSQL, REST APIs
•Engineered a real-time gym occupancy platform used by live users to estimate crowd levels throughout the day, designing a
privacy-first data model with anonymous device hashes to support check-ins, automatic check-outs, and user surveys.
•Implemented a decay-based aggregation algorithm to compute stable occupancy percentages from raw event data, computing all
metrics on-demand (no cron jobs) while handling timezone-aware logic and enforcing rate-limiting to prevent abuse.
